# Hi there 👋 I am Derek Lien
![banner](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/74038190/240304586-d48893bd-0757-481c-8d7e-ba3e163feae7.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..B8SLhsnMNtRf4UdWojpUNKxYV483fh0238ukxpHL49U)
## 👨🏻‍💻 About Me
I'm a full-stack developer focused on building scalable web applications and clean backend systems. I care about performance, maintainability, and solving real-world problems with simple, thoughtful solutions.

## ⚡Tech Stack
![My Skills](https://go-skill-icons.vercel.app/api/icons?i=js,typescript,html,css,react,postgresql,supabase,tailwindcss,nodejs,vercel)

## 📌Pinned Repositories
### 🚀[SpotBot (Street Fighter Tech Tracker)](https://github.com/frontierSpaceAlien/SpotBot)
A tool to track Street Fighter 6 character tech, helping competitive players memorize strategy and execution.
### 🏦 [ASLMortgages - POC](https://github.com/frontierSpaceAlien/ASLMortgages_POC)
Proof-of-concept PERN stack application built for ASL Mortgages to prototype mortgage workflows.
### 🎬 [Copyflix](https://github.com/frontierSpaceAlien/Copyflix)
A front-end recreation of the Netflix UI for learning modern web layout and responsiveness.
